description_long: This is a modern platform bed with a wooden frame and a tall, upholstered headboard in dark gray. The bed is neatly made with a textured blue comforter, a gray blanket, and a set of multiple pillows in shades of blue and gray, arranged in a layered fashion against the headboard. A small brown plush toy sits atop the bedding, adding a touch of personality. The mattress is thick and white, visible beneath the bedding, and the bed sits on short, sturdy wooden legs. The foot of the bed is open, with no footboard, and the frame has a clean, minimalist design. The overall appearance is cozy and inviting, suitable for a contemporary urban bedroom.
description: A modern platform bed with a wooden frame, dark gray upholstered headboard, blue and gray bedding, and a plush toy on top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full headboard, layered pillows, blue comforter, and plush toy centered on the bed.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the mattress, the arrangement of pillows, and the depth of the bedding.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid wooden back of the headboard and a partial view of the plush toy above the bedding.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing the open foot of the bed, the platform frame, and the arrangement of bedding and pillows.
